title: Chewy (CHWY) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Wall Street analyst coverage of Chewy demonstrates strong bullish sentiment. The 23 analysts covering Chewy have a consensus rating of Strong Buy with an average price target of $43.39, forecasting an 88.69% increase over the next year. Recent price target changes from major banks provide insight into sentiment shifts. TD Cowen analyst William Kerr raised the firm's price target on Chewy to $42 from $39 and maintained a Buy rating. Citizens lowered its price target to $45 from $48 while keeping an Outperform rating. Goldman Sachs lowered its price target to $46 from $52 but maintained a Buy rating. The narrow distribution of price targets (generally $40-$46 range) suggests growing consensus on Chewy's valuation. Earnings growth forecasts are bullish, with Chewy expected to grow earnings and revenue by 26.3% and 7.5% per annum respectively, and EPS expected to grow by 25.1% per annum. Next quarter's earnings estimate is $0.24 with a range of $0.19 to $0.28, indicating analyst confidence in continued earnings power.
